---
title: "Deep learning versus Object-based Image Analysis (OBIA) in weed mapping of UAV imagery"
id: materialspat-analysis-3
order: 143
summary: "A quantitative comparison of OBIA and deep learning approaches for weed mapping in UAV imagery."
source_url: "https://doi.org/10.1080/01431161.2019.1706112"
modules:
  - module-hr-analysis
Goals:
  - module-goals-spat-analysis
activities:
  - activity-analysis-3
assessments:
  - assessment-spat-analysis
labels:
  - advanced
  - recommended
  - optional
published: true
source: "../LV-uav-workflow/morea/spatial_analysis/materialspat-analysis-3.md"
---

Read the article:

<https://doi.org/10.1080/01431161.2019.1706112>

## Connected Module

- [Analysis of high resolution aerial data](../modules/module-hr-analysis.qmd)
